mapper.sql: id, user_id, record_type, type_id, content, is_correct, study_time, create_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_study_record (user_id, record_type, type_id, content, is_correct, study_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{recordType}, #{typeId}, #{content}, #{isCorrect}, #{studyTime})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_study_record WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_study_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND DATE(create_time) = #{date}
